rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant And Cross-Complainant Jimmy Budihalim'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Order Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants To Engage New Counsel Or Appear Pro Per
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT JIMMY BUDIHALIM's Motion To Order Plaintiff To Engage New Counsel Or Appear Pro Per is granted as follows: Defendants may serve all documents related to this case directly on Plaintiff until Plaintiff engages counsel. Defendants complied with CCP 286 requirements. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions For Violation Of Ccp Sect 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 2. Respondent's Motion for Sanctions under CCP 128.7 is DENIED. Moving party failed to provide any evidence of compliance with CCP 128.7(c)(1). Motion is untimely per CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment On The Complaint In Favor Of Defendant East Westbank
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(f). Also, Plaintiff's late-filed Memorandum of Points and Authorities does not address any of the authorities cited in the moving papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHANIE JACKSON et al VS. KISHORE KAGOLANU et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT KATHRYN SHAFFER's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to June 26, 2015. Moving and opposing parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide copies of their respective submissions in support of and in opposition to the demurrer to department 501 no later than May 29, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. The Court received 3 copies of the Notice of Demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COSTANZO BUZZELLI et al VS. MARY DEBENEDETTI, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE MARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Order Permitting Submission Of Augmented Initial Expert Witness Disclosure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFFS COSTANZO BUZZELLI, NANCY HAYDEN, NICHOLAS PAPAGEORGE, QUYNH PHAN, PAUL TAFT, MARIKO TAKEL, ARISTOTLE SMITH, and CAROL URBAN's Motion For Order Permitting Submission Of Augmented Initial Expert Witness Disclosure is GRANTED. Opposing party to immediately deliver a courtesy copy of its opposition filed on May 26, 2015 to department 501 per SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JERROLD JACOBY ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petitioners Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Ccp § 1021.5
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 6. Plaintiff's Motion for Attorney's Fees. Hearing Required to address the rate of discount. See Lyons v. Chinese Hosp. Ass'n (2006) 136 Cal.App.4th 1331. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: JERROLD JACOBY ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Motion to Tax Costs is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The amounts of $73 and $135 are taxed. The motion is other wise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JERROLD JACOBY ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder And Support Of Respondent City And County Of San Franciscos Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 6. Intervenor's Joinder to Motion to Tax Costs is GRANTED in part. The amounts of $73 and $135 are taxed. The motion is other wise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is continued to June 24, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide Courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than June 5, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP I LLC VS. MARIA MARANGHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 8. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to June 2, 2015 on Court's' own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. NANCY ANN LAUNIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Rebecca Borman And Ryan Borman Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Thursday, May 28, 2015, line 9. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons. Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)
